summary: Timestamp Error tab patch produced. The existing ts-april-2026-update block is extended with two additive paragraphs (inserted between the counterpoint-reading paragraph and the closing where-the-line-currently-sits paragraph) and an amended TLDR that acknowledges the parallel killshot.html AI-Auditor prose concession (commit 6e06efb, 2026-04-17 07:39 EDT). Patch is additive — no existing text is removed. Charitable framing: the concession is credited as real movement in the right direction and as a necessary precondition for the structural fix, while the structural-fix gap (predictions-only file independently anchored) is explicitly restated. Canary status remains active; the rhetorical narrowing does not meet the trigger condition (which requires separate prediction-document anchoring). Cross-reference added from Timestamp Error tab to EXP-188 (Kill-Shots tab) Section 5.0. Decider: apply patch to ts-april-2026-update in Part 5b / Timestamp Error tab of sections.json (or wherever that detail block lives in the data/sections.json source). See EXP-189.patch_instructions for exact insertion points. After applying, ISS-1156 can be closed.
